design_philosophy: A collision of an ancient magical grimoire (high-end serif typography, deep cinematic shadows) with a modern technical terminal (monospace fonts, 1px grid lines, amber glows). Tactile, serious, and literary.

spacing_and_layout.inventory_grid: grid grid-cols-2 gap-px bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-800

surfaces_and_borders.top_bar: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80 border-b border-white/10
surfaces_and_borders.choice_card: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 hover:border-amber-500/50 hover:bg-amber-500/5 transition-all rounded-sm
surfaces_and_borders.terminal_input: bg-transparent border-b border-zinc-700 focus:border-amber-500 font-mono text-amber-500 outline-none w-full py-3

motion.text_reveal: framer-motion opacity-0 to opacity-100 with slight y-offset for new story paragraphs
motion.pulse: animate-pulse for active states or critical health

Main_Menu.layout: Flex column, centered full height. D20 hero image taking up substantial space, slowly floating.
Main_Menu.buttons: Large block links, monospace, uppercase with 1px border. E.g., 'NEW STORY'.

Genre_Cards.layout: Bento grid mode. Relative wrapper with aspect-video.
Genre_Cards.overlay: Absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/40 to-transparent.
Genre_Cards.text: Absolute bottom-0 left-0 p-4 font-serif text-2xl text-white

Story_Screen.header: Sticky top bar showing [HP: 20/20] [STR: 12/20] [OBJ: Survive] in monospace.
Story_Screen.prose_area: Generous padding, serif font, left aligned. Newest paragraphs at the bottom.
Story_Screen.choices_area: Stack of outline buttons at the bottom. Monospace text (e.g. '[A] Investigate').
Story_Screen.custom_action: Input field with '>' prefix, blinking cursor.

Inventory_Ledger.layout: Grid borders (Technical look). 1px gaps. Dense info.
Inventory_Ledger.typography: 100% Monospace. Looks like a retro terminal or command line.

hero_d20.description: Glowing D20 die in dark void. Use on Home Screen.

genre_fantasy.description: Dark fantasy ruins. Use for Fantasy genre preset.

genre_post_apoc.description: Ruined city wasteland. Use for Post-Apocalyptic preset.

genre_cosmic.description: Cosmic horror landscape. Use for Cosmic Horror preset.

genre_detective.description: Rainy street noir. Use for Detective/Urban Crime preset.

genre_dino.description: Dark foggy pathway. Use for Dinosaur Survival preset.

genre_horror.description: Spooky dark forest path. Use for Horror preset.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global background is strictly #050505 or deep dark bg to create the terminal/grimoire feel.
Use EB Garamond for the main story prose with leading-relaxed (line-height) to ensure reading comfort.
Use JetBrains Mono for ALL UI elements (health, choices, menus, inventory, action bar). This creates the tension between 'book' and 'engine'.
Implement the top state bar using glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80) so story text seamlessly scrolls under it.
For the inventory and debug panels, use a strict grid layout with 1px borders (border-collapse style or gap-px with bg-zinc-800 wrapper) to emulate a technical ledger.
Use standard semantic HTML tags and customize Shadcn components, stripping out any soft shadows or large rounded corners (use rounded-none or rounded-sm max).
Do not use generic blue/purple colors for main accents. Stick to the monochromatic slate/black with amber/emerald terminal accents.
Include data-testid on all interactable elements (e.g. data-testid='genre-select-fantasy', data-testid='choice-btn-0').
